channel.title: Native on Nature Works
channel.description: Recent content in Native on Nature Works

item.title: Mostly native
item.description:
Detail of a mostly native windbreak hedge on the eco-homes project

On part of the eco-homes project I’m landscaping, there’s a 2m high clay and shale bank. http://localhost:1313/blog/mostly-native/

item.title: Wildlife Forest Garden May 2020
item.description: My next free lockdown forest garden livestream is: The Wildlife Forest Garden Wednesday 6th May, 10am BST twitch. http://localhost:1313/blog/wildlife-forest-garden-may-2020/

item.title: This is a local garden, for local species
item.description: Humans are strange creatures, capable of abstracting their minds unfathomable distances from their situation. http://localhost:1313/blog/local-garden-local-species/
